shop.title: ⚡ Shop

payment.title: Payment
payment.subtitle: Send the exact amount with MEMO
payment.expired_text: Order expired. If you sent TON — contact support.
payment.no_memo_warning: ❗ Without MEMO the payment won't be credited
payment.checking_payment: Checking payment every 5 minutes. Power will be credited automatically.
payment.rule_exact_amount: Send the EXACT amount. If the amount differs by even 0.01 TON — the payment will NOT be credited automatically.
payment.rule_memo_required: MEMO (comment) is required. Without it we cannot find your payment and it won't be credited.
payment.rule_time_limit: You have 60 minutes to pay. After that the order will be cancelled. If you sent later — contact support.
payment.exact_amount_warning: ⚠️ Send EXACTLY this amount, otherwise payment won't be credited!
payment.check_not_found: Payment not found yet. Make sure amount and MEMO are correct. Try again in 30 seconds.

tasks.title: 📋 Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Complete tasks — get free Power
tasks.watch_desc: Watch a short video and earn POWER
tasks.watch_full_ad: ⚡ Watch the full ad to get a reward
tasks.monetag_desc: Watch a Monetag ad and earn POWER
tasks.not_subscribed: ❌ You haven't subscribed yet! Subscribe and tap Check.
tasks.subscribe_hint: Subscribe to the channel and tap ✓ Check
tasks.task_error: Error completing task. Try again later.
tasks.order_desc: Promote your channel, bot or link
tasks.send_ton_desc: Pay by transferring to the wallet
tasks.memo_warning: Include MEMO in your transfer, otherwise payment won't be found!
tasks.bot_admin_hint: Add bot @AurumMiBot as admin to your channel for subscription verification. Use public link (t.me/channel), not invite.
tasks.bot_not_admin_error: Bot is not a channel admin. Add @AurumMiBot as administrator!
tasks.payment_not_found: Payment not found yet. Try again later.

team.how_it_works_text: invite a friend → they buy Power → you get +{{power}}K Power and {{pct}}% from each purchase in TON

ambassador.title: Ambassador
ambassador.subtitle: Partner program for channels
ambassador.benefit_commission: Elevated commission {{pct}}% from referral purchases (instead of standard)
ambassador.benefit_posts: Promotional posts from our partners to your channel
ambassador.benefit_ref: Personal referral link with automatic tracking
ambassador.step3: Give the bot permission to post messages
ambassador.step4: Submit an application — we'll review and approve
ambassador.warning_text: If the bot is removed from your channel's admins, the partnership will be automatically terminated. Verification is performed every 24 hours.
ambassador.apply_hint: Enter your channel username (min. {{min}} subscribers). Bot must be added as admin with posting permissions.
ambassador.empty_desc: Submit an application with your Telegram channel ({{min}}+ subscribers) and become our partner
